ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size label */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* Range of sizes that the label covers */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., top, bottom, dress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., UK, EU, US, AUS) */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code for the region (e.g., UK, EU, US, AUS) */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the standard size label */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "region_size" TEXT /* Size in the region's standard */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate for the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "SKU" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the customer */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the customer */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement of the customer */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement of the customer */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement of the customer */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, in) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product purchased */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product purchased */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the purchase was made */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the purchase was made */,
  "purchase_amount" REAL /* Amount of the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in the region */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_access" (
  "api_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API access */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the client using the API */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key provided to the client */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the client has */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date for the API key */,
  "api_status" TEXT /* Status of the API access (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_access_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "purchase_count" INTEGER /* Number of purchases for the size and region */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue for the size and region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
